licensing_and_possession.Section 3: Licence for acquisition and possession of firearms and ammunition. No person shall acquire, have in his possession, or carry any firearm or ammunition unless he holds a licence issued in accordance with the provisions of this Act
licensing_and_possession.Section 4: Licence for manufacture, sale, etc. No person shall manufacture, sell, transfer, convert, repair, test or prove any firearm or ammunition unless he holds a licence
licensing_and_possession.Section 5: Licence for shortening of firearm or conversion of imitation firearms. No person shall shorten the barrel of a firearm or convert an imitation firearm into a firearm
licensing_and_possession.Section 6: Licence for dealing in arms and ammunition. Prohibition on dealing without licence
licensing_and_possession.Section 7: Prohibition of acquisition or possession of prohibited arms or prohibited ammunition

offences_and_penalties.Section 25(1A): Punishment for manufacture, sale, transfer of prohibited arms or prohibited ammunition. Imprisonment 7 years to life and fine
offences_and_penalties.Section 25(1AA): Punishment for acquisition, possession or carrying of prohibited arms. Imprisonment 7 years to life and fine
offences_and_penalties.Section 25(1B): Whoever uses or attempts to use prohibited arms or prohibited ammunition shall be punishable with imprisonment 7 years to life and fine. If results in death: death or imprisonment for life
offences_and_penalties.Section 25(1)(a): Whoever acquires, has in his possession or carries any firearm or ammunition in contravention of section 3 shall be punishable with imprisonment 1-3 years and fine
offences_and_penalties.Section 25(1)(e): Whoever sells or transfers any firearm to any person without licence or in contravention of licence. Imprisonment 3-7 years and fine
offences_and_penalties.Section 25(2): If any person convicted under sub-section 1 is again convicted, minimum punishment shall be imprisonment 3-7 years and fine
offences_and_penalties.Section 27: Punishment for using arms etc. Whoever uses any prohibited arms or prohibited ammunition or does any act in contravention of section 7 and such use or act results in the death of any person shall be punishable with death
offences_and_penalties.Section 27(1): Whoever uses any arms or ammunition in contravention of section 5 shall be punishable with imprisonment up to 7 years or fine or both
offences_and_penalties.Section 27(2): If any person uses firearms or ammunition in a rash or negligent manner so as to endanger human life: imprisonment up to 2 years or fine Rs 2000 or both
offences_and_penalties.Section 27(3): If any person uses any arms or ammunition while committing any offence, the minimum imprisonment shall be 7 years extending up to life imprisonment
offences_and_penalties.Section 29: Punishment for knowingly purchasing arms from unlicensed person or delivering arms to person not entitled to possess. Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both
offences_and_penalties.Section 30: Penalty for certain offences - possession of arms in specified areas notified by the government. Enhanced penalties in disturbed areas
